title: Item Refresh
description: Changes the look of tools, armor, and various other items by applying consistent color palettes across sets.
body:
![About](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/19d332cdab77737cd016fd7c1ae13efef260cbc7_0.webp)

This resource pack refreshes the look of tools, armor, and various other items by applying consistent color palettes across sets. Diamond, gold, and iron tools now match the color palettes of their respective item textures and reuse the fishing rod stick texture. All wood-based items share the palette used for the crossbow.

![Changes](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6fa66b49032f32e9bda3abbc30537784ac421bf8_0.webp)

![v1](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a6fca1d63e3e8b086e8f9f17e194336c72d13833.gif)
 ![v1](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/baff05b9f436bc9bd2982c7924b3967021c0a756.gif)
